Wrong tool selection contrary to the prescribed workflow
Invalid or unsupported tool parameters or formats (e.g., unsupported unit pairs, topic mismatches, JSON string instead of object)
Missing required planning step before execution
Failure to chain tool outputs; hard-coding values instead of using previous results
Incomplete computations that omit final answers (e.g., missing ratios, percentages, or conversions)
Omitting required intermediate steps or results
Redundant or unnecessary tool calls that add no progress or duplicate provided facts
Incorrect or inconsistent unit handling (mixing units or not converting to required units)
Not adapting to tool limitations by acknowledging unsupported operations and choosing a workaround
Mis-invoked tools or pseudo-calls where parameters are provided but the tool is not actually executed
Failing to cover all requested sub-tasks or outputs
Mislabeling precision or failing to note rounding
